silver.name: Revel IT
silver.description: Revel IT is a Dublin, OH based IT staffing and consulting firm focused on delivering exceptional tech talent and workforce solutions.

silver.name: BPS Technologies
silver.description: BPS Technologies partners with organizations to solve complex challenges through innovative IT talent, staffing, and consulting solutions —grounded in a people-first focus on quality and accountability.

silver.name: PowerSync
silver.description: PowerSync is a sync engine that consists of two components: a service that enables high-scalability partial data syncing and a set of client SDKs that manage client-side persistence, consistency, reactivity and syncing write operations back.

silver.name: CGI
silver.description: Insights you can act on. Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world. We are insights-driven and outcomes-focused to help accelerate returns on your investments.

silver.name: IGS
silver.description: IGS Energy is a family-owned energy company serving over 1 million customers. They offer green electricity, carbon-neutral natural gas, and solar solutions emphasizing sustainability and tailored energy strategies.

silver.name: OCLC
silver.description: At OCLC, we exist because what is known must be shared. On the surface this seems simple. But dig deeper. We hold petabytes of diverse data in different languages, different scripts, and different formats.

community.name: Chocolatey
community.description: Chocolatey is software management automation for Windows that wraps installers, executables, zips, and scripts into compiled packages. Chocolatey integrates w/SCCM, Puppet, Chef, etc. Chocolatey is trusted by businesses to manage software deployments.

community.name: Ready Set Agile
community.description: Our mission is to bridge the gap between business need and necessary expertise to continuously craft high value.  We do this by empowering thrivers to obtain feedback rapidly and respond to change.
